title: Secret RU Doors
description: Addon for Regions Unexplored and Super Secret Doors that adds RU-specific secret doors/trapdoors
body:
Addon for [Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/mod/regions-unexplored) and [Super Secret Doors](https://modrinth.com/mod/secret-ce-doors) that adds in BOP-specific secret doors!  Includes doors and trapdoors for

- all wood types, including planks, logs (in both orientations), and stripped logs (ditto)
- painted planks
- chalk bricks
